title: Sky: Children of the Light
notes:
Art You Can Walk Through
Explore beautiful, playable environments made from Van Gogh's best known paintings, from sunlit fields in the Netherlands to the glowing night skies that only he could imagine. Each and every landscape is a work of art in motion, rendered in his bold, expressive brushstroke style and alive with the emotion he poured into every canvas.

For details: http://bit.ly/sky-patchnotes

4. Fixed battle bugs: Brick Zobo leaping, Goonbug dashing in place, Pyroclobster/Pyroviathan burn damage.

title: Coin Master
notes:
Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

Enjoying Coin Master? Leave a review :)

title: Archero 2
notes:
1. Added Legendary Heroes Demeter and Artemis and exclusive Skins.
2. Added Guild Raid, Camp Visit, Friendly Duel, Charm System, Titles, and Rankings.
3. Rumble Ladder S3 begins with the new 3v3 Football Rumble mode.
4. Added Gear & Rune Lock
5. Unlocked Shackled Jungle 1101-1300, Campaign 161-170, and Hard 146-155.
6. Added defensive bonuses in Peak Arena.
7. Improved Guild Expedition stats, event chat, and scoring.
8. Reduced chapter difficulty and fixed various issues.
